pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates and activates the '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/themes/magazine-child' directory and theme.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which dynamically tests reading time logic by generating a 450-word post and expecting '3 min', and a 100-word post expecting '1 min' (based on a 200 wpm rate).

pi_items.metadata_value: Disclaimer: This content is for informational purposes only and not substitute for professional medical advice.
pi_items.verified_value: Disclaimer: This content is for informational purposes only and not substitute for professional medical advice.
pi_items.source: Confirmed via the explicit task instructions in task.json and export_result.sh which checks for the substring 'informational purposes only'.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated environment where the target child theme is explicitly set to 'magazine-child'. Verification scripts enforce a reading speed calculation of 200 words per minute (e.g., expecting a 450-word post to equal a 3-minute reading time). The required disclaimer text for the Health category is 'Disclaimer: This content is for informational purposes only and not substitute for professional medical advice.', which is verified by checking for its core substrings in the output.
